Thanks for contributing! Please keep PRs small and focused.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New API resource
- [ ] Fix to an existing resource (schema drift / bug)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-resource)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (typecheck, lint, format:check, test, build, check:pkg)
- [ ] Tests added or updated, asserting against a fixture
- [ ] README **Resources** table updated (if a resource was added or changed)
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
